name: Souper Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup (10 3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Prep time: 10 minutes. Cook time: 1 hour 20 minutes.
1. Mix together half a cup of mushroom soup, onion soup mix, ground beef, bread crumbs, and egg in a bowl until well combined.
2. Place the mixture firmly into an oblong baking dish shaped to dimensions of 8x4 inches.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until cooked through. Remove any excess fat and set aside 1-2 tablespoons of drippings.
4. In a quart saucepan, combine the remaining mushroom soup, water, and reserved drippings. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally.
5. Serves 8 people.
Serving Suggestion: Accompany with carrots, sliced new potatoes, and parsley garnish.
